creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, May 22, 2000 at 05:50:44PM -0500, Ade Lovett wrote:
> As for the rest of your argument, I take it then that you keep an
> eye on devel/libslang, 

Yes.  Mutt is the only Slang binary I use and care about.

> textproc/ispell, textproc/sgmlformat,

These are programs and you know as well as I do that changes in them are
not near as intrusive as changes to library ports.

> devel/ncurses, 

Nope.  It was added for someone else.  They need to tell me when it
breaks.

> openssl, 

Nope.  It was added for someone else.  They need to tell me when it
breaks.

> textproc/urlview

Yes.  I only use urlview with Mutt.
